name: Steal Web Session Cookie - Browser Cookie Database Access by Non-Browser Process
description: Detects web session cookie theft by monitoring for non-browser processes accessing Chrome/Edge/Firefox cookie databases, infostealer tools, and EvilGinx2 session capture.
query: file where event.type == "access" and file.name : ("Cookies", "cookies.sqlite") and file.path : ("*Chrome*User Data*", "*Edge*User Data*", "*Firefox*Profiles*") and not process.name : ("chrome.exe", "msedge.exe", "firefox.exe", "brave.exe")
note: Alternative for tool detection: process.command_line: (*SharpChromium* or *CookieKatz* or *chrome-cookie*)
